verses.text: Aaron' suante a kisehkhennate hih bang ahi hi. Aaron' tapate: Nadab, Abihu, Eleazar, leh Ithamar ahi uh hi
Ahih hangin a pa uh a sih ma-in Nadab leh Abihu si-in ta neilo uh ahih manin Eleazar leh Ithamar-te siampi suak uh hi
Eleazar' suan Zadok, leh Ithamar' suan Ahimelek' huhna tawh David in amau' nasepna-ah a kiseh bangin Aaron' suante a koih hi
Ithamar' suante lak sangin Eleazar' suante lakah ukpi tam omzaw ahih manin, amaute in Eleazar' suante pawl sawmleguk suahin, Ithamar' suante pawl giat suah uh hi
Eleazar' suante leh Ithamar' suante lakah biakinn uliante leh Pasian' uliante om tuak uh ahih manin amaute in a kibangin aisanna tawh amaute koih uh hi

Tua ciangin Levi mi Nethanel' tapa ahi lai-atpa Shemaiah in kumpipa, uliante, siampi Zadok, Abiathar' tapa Ahimelek, siampite, leh Levi mi beh lutangte' omna-ah amaute ciamteh hi. Eleazar' suante-a' dingin khat kiteelin, tua ciangin Ithamar' suante-a' dingin khat kiteel a, kilaihsak niloh uh hi
Aisanna a masa pen Jehoiarib tung, a nihna Jedaiah tung
a thumna Harim tung, a lina Seorim tung
a ngana Malkhijah tung, a gukna Mijamin tung
a sagihna Hakkoz tung, a giatna Abijah tung
a kuana Jeshua tung, a sawmna Shekaniah tung
a sawmlekhatna Eliashib tung, a sawmlenihna Jakim tung
a sawmlethumna Huppah tung, a sawmlelina Jeshebeab tung
a sawmlengana Bilgah tung, a sawmlegukna Immer tung
a sawmlesagihna Hezir tung, a sawmlegiatna Happizzez tung
a sawmlekuana Pethahiah tung, a sawmnihna Jehezkel tung
a sawmnihlekhatna Jakhin tung, a sawmnihlenihna Gamul tung
a sawmnihlethumna Delaiah tung, a sawmnihlelina Maaziah tungah a tu hi
Hihte in Israel Topa Pasian in amah a thupiak bangin a pupi uh Aaron in amaute-a' dingin a kipsaksa ngeina bangin Topa' biakinn sungah a pai dingin amau' nasep uh ahi a kiseh nasep nei uh hi
Tua ciangin Levi suante a omlaite lakah: Aram' suante sung panin Shubael' suante Jehdeiah ahi hi
Rehabiah' suante sung panin Isshiah a ukpi ahi hi
Izhar' suante sung panin Shelomoth' suante Jahath ahi hi
Hebron' suante lakah: Jeriah a ukpi, Amariah a nihna, Jahaziel a thumna, Jekameam a lina ahi hi
Uzziel' suante sung panin Mikah' suante Shamir ahi hi
Isshiah' suante sung panin Zekhariah ahi hi. Mikah' sanggampa pen Isshiah ahi hi
Merari' suante: Mahli, Mushi, leh Jaaziah ahi hi
Merari' suante Jaaziah sung panin Beno, Shoham, Zakkur, leh Ibri ahi hi
Mahli in tapa nih, Eleazar leh Kish nei hi. Eleazar in tapa neilo a, Kish in Jerahmeel a kici tapa khat nei hi
Mushi' tapate: Mahli, Eder, leh Jerimoth ahi uh hi. Hihte pen a beh tawh kizui-in Levi' suante ahi uh hi

Hihte in zong a behte uh ahi Aaron' suante mah bangin Kumpi David, Zadok, Ahimelek, siampite, leh Levi mi beh lutangte' muhna-ah beh lutangte leh a nau pasalte khat ciat in a kibangin aisanna tawh nasep tavuan a la uh hi.
